stemHtml: An aircraft is executing a VFR flight in Class C airspace. Which of the following is essential traffic to this flight?

options.a: IFR flights which are separated according to applicable minima.
options.b: IFR flights which will not be separated according to applicable minima.
options.c: VFR flights which are separated according to applicable minima.
options.d: VFR flights which will not be separated.
